hotel_name: Hilton Garden Inn Chengde Mountain Resort

reviews.title: Good but not out of the ordinary
reviews.text: The hotel is ok, but there is nothing out of the ordinary. The room was clean, but could have been better cleaned. The Chinese breakfast buffet was worse than the other ones we experienced, but on the whole not really bad. The hotel is geared towards groups and it has no atmosphere at all. Staff was, as far is they spoke English (a few did) helpful. There was a gym, but strange enough you had to pay for it. Bring your own glass as they have water but nothing to drink it from!
reviews.positives: Helpful staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Like it a lot.

reviews.title: Hotel  mit einem altsozialistischen Flair
reviews.text:
Es gab nur eine Englisch sprechende Dame an der Rezeption, die war allerdings äußerst hilfsbereit und feundlich. 
Die Zimmer waren sauber und geräumig. Das Frühstück war in Ordnung.
reviews.positives: Prima Lage

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great and nice staff, among whom some spoke good English. The room was clean and comfortable, and the location was ideal. Breakfast was also good. The staff was also kind enough to keep an eye on our luggage after check-out while we toured the city for our last day, as our train was scheduled late in the evening. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 確かに８月に満室の時期に泊ってましたが、ホテルに入ったら、トイレのお水が溢れて来て、すぐ修理を呼びました。対応が遅くてなかなか直らずに、テレビも古過ぎてつけることが出来なかったです。エレベータは二台しかないので、人も物運ぶも同じエレベータ、環境は最悪でした。唯一よかったのは避暑山庄に近い、立地便利です。

reviews.title: Nice place.
reviews.positives:
The exercise room was well equipped, and easily accessed. 
It was located near a nice central people’s square area where there is a lots restaurants and a lot of interesting street life.. large breakfast. The staff as always with most of the bookings.com properties was fabulous and helpful. 
  Within just walking distance of the Qing Dynasty Summer Resort.
The staff was smart and dug deep to quickly help me help me answer some Great Wall travel questions.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
酒店位置方便,但停車不方便. 房間比較舊. 
前臺服務很好,退房時正值下雨前臺的當值小姐有幫手拿傘和行李送到較遠的停車位.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Emplacement idéal
Chambres spacieuses et archi confortables 
Personnel au petit soin (avec l’aide de traducteurs!)
Le chef cuistot du petit dej est très sympa
reviews.negatives: Isolation phonique pas terrible entre les chambres, on entend tout!

reviews.title: Hôtel de qualité mais il faut éviter les chambres traversées par des colonnes.
reviews.positives: Hôtel moderne et confortable, très bien situé à proximité de nombreux restaurants.
reviews.negatives: Une colonne faisant vraisemblablement partie de la structure porteuse du bâtiment obstruait en grande partie la fenêtre et diminuait considérablement la luminosité.

reviews.title: Le meilleur endroit où séjourner à Chengde
reviews.positives: Parfait à tout point de vue. Très professionnel bien sûr mais aussi très bon emplacement, hyper calme et confortable et propreté irréprochable. Probablement le meilleur endroit où séjourner à Chengde. Le bus n°26 depuis la gare TGV vous dépose à 100m de l'hôtel pour 3Y.
reviews.negatives: Il est possible qu'une des réceptionnistes ne parle pas Anglais mais ce n'est pas un problème avec un traducteur.

reviews.title: Einfacher Standard in sehr guter Lage.
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches Personal, frisch renoviert. Die Lage ist sehr gut.
reviews.negatives: Der Koch konnte am besten englisch. Speisesaal sehr steril.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Unterstützung durch das Personal

reviews.title: Optimal für einen Kurzbesuch
reviews.positives:
Das gut geführte Hotel liegt sehr nahe am Haupteingang zum Kaiserpalast. Per Taxi lassen sich bequem und schnell die verschiedenen sehenswerten Tempel besichtigen.
Das Frühstück ist sehr empfehlenswert und gute Restaurants finden sich in der Umgebung.

reviews.title: Heerlijk
reviews.positives: Prachtig en schoon hotel! Personeel super vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Heerlijk ontbijt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 地點很好, 走出來就是熱鬧大街. 房間乾淨舒適, 早餐美味, 服務人員態度佳

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 员工热情友善.地点不错
reviews.negatives: 空調制冷性能差了些.早餐的品种也不多.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 早餐很好，房間設備亦超出預期，接近4星水平，有健身室可惜沒有泳池，地點很近避暑山莊，搭一個巴士站便到，步行約10分鐘，附近很多食店和超市，亦有直達巴士往高鐵站，十分方便
reviews.negatives: 酒店是聯銷式，市內有多家同名酒店，booking.com給的地址也不對，小心不要攪錯

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Das Hilton Garden Inn Hotel, Chengde Mountain Resort ist unübertroffen gut. Wir kommen aus Deutschland und sind bei Booking.com super Premium Kunden mit über 300 Buchungen. Haben also in der ganzen Welt vergleiche, USA, DUBAI, RUẞLAND usw! Dieses Hotel ist geschmackvoll und funktional das man sich 100% wohl füht, von der ersten Minute an. Als wenn das nicht schon genug wäre, haben Sie ein Personal das den Gast in allen Angelegenheiten unglaublich betreut. Die Chefin der Rezeption, LINDA, begrüßt uns in perfektem Englisch bei der Ankunft und wie selbstverständlich ist SIE für die nächsten 4 Tage unsere persönliche Ansprechpartnerin.  Diese Mentalität sich verantwortlich zu fühlen und dem Gast sofort und Zielführend zu helfen, das ist der Schlüssel zum Erfolg eines Hotels!
 Frau LINDA hat uns beeindruckt. Das Hotel liegt sehr zentral und da wir schon zum 6. mal in China sind , das Land und die Menschen lieben kommen wir sicherlich noch mal in dieses Hotel zurück.Es liegt für uns im Weltvergleich ganz vorne  Danke

承德山度假希尔顿花园酒店简直太棒了！我们来自德国，是Booking.com的尊享会员，预订次数超过300次。我们住过世界各地的酒店，包括美国、迪拜和俄罗斯！这家酒店的设计既雅致又实用，从您踏入酒店的第一分钟起，就让您感到百分百舒适。不仅如此，酒店员工对每位客人都体贴入微。前台主管琳达在我们抵达时用一口流利的英语迎接了我们，并在接下来的四天里全程担任我们的专属联系人。这种责任感以及能够及时有效地帮助客人，正是酒店成功的关键！

琳达女士给我们留下了深刻的印象。酒店地理位置优越，位于市中心。这是我们第六次来中国，我们热爱这个国家和这里的人民，我们一定会再次入住这家酒店。在我们心中，它绝对是世界顶级酒店之一。谢谢！

reviews.title: Nice hotel with great value of money
reviews.positives: very well located, clean and good facility in, nice breakfast, very nice staff.
reviews.negatives: It was not easy to find the way to adjust room temperature.

reviews.title: This hotel is the perfect location and just absolute value for money!! I can totally recommend it!
reviews.positives: The staff were absolutley amazing!! Everybody was so friendly - from the reception staff, to the cleaning staff, to the doorman, Pei, to the manager Linda - everybody made our stay so memorable.  I have to mention Linda seperately.  As the staff realized we dont speak Chinese, Linda was called.  She made sure we had everything we needed, helped to book tickets, gave us rooms next to each other, made sure we had the most fantastic breakfast every morning and just in general tried to help us wherever she was able to.  Because of her, our stay was just amazing!! The entire property was absolutely spotless, from the gleaming lobby to the well-maintained common areas. I was so impressed by the immaculate condition of my room; it felt fresh, hygienic, and thoroughly deep-cleaned.  You can tell the housekeeping staff takes great pride in their work, as every corner of the hotel was perfectly tidy and dust-free.  Linda and staff, thank you for everything!! Keep up the fantastic work that you are doing!!
reviews.negatives: Honestly speaking, there is nothing negative I can say about Hilton Garden Inn Chengde Mountain Resort!! Fantastic location, super comfortable beds, meticulously clean rooms, and great breakfasts!! And you have to try the sticky pork at the Chinese restaurant on site!!

reviews.title: Very satisfied
reviews.positives: I really enjoyed the stay,  a staff named TianHui is very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The quality of the breakfast could be improved.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
It was amazing. The hotel is nice and clean. Room was spacious and modern. Breakfast had a wide choice and everything tasted great. The location is perfect, just a few minutes way from the Mountain Resort. 
But the true star of the hotel are the staff. They were so welcoming!!! And whatever we needed, they were able to provide in a few minutes. They were also very helpful in helping us to navigate around the city and gave us good tips to restaurants and street food markets. 
Overall one the best hotel experiences I have had in China. And probably one of the best hotel experiences I’ve had in general.
